front:
SKILL 21 вҖ” TUB BATH
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Towels, bath blanket, washcloths, soap, shampoo, lotion, clean clothing, gloves, tub chair, bath thermometer, safety straps
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Fill tub HALF FULL, 104-105В°F вҖ” resident tests temperature themselves
вӯҗ Safety straps ALL fastened on tub chair вҖ” tug each to confirm secure
вӯҗ Clean CLEANEST TO DIRTIEST: Eyes вҶ’ Face/Neck/Ears вҶ’ Arms/Armpits вҶ’ Chest/Abdomen вҶ’ Legs/Feet вҶ’ Back/Buttocks вҶ’ Perineal Care
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Prepare tub room FIRST вҖ” clean tub, dry floor, air temperature OK.
4. Offer toilet. Assist if needed.
5. Walk/wheel resident and supplies to tub room.
6. вӯҗ Fill tub HALF FULL with WARM water. Thermometer: 104вҖ“105В°F. Guide resident's hand to water вҖ” THEY test it. Add cleanser if used. Gloves on.
7. Help undress. Drape TOWEL over groin and TOWEL over shoulders (covered and warm).
8. вӯҗ Help resident into TUB CHAIR. FASTEN ALL SAFETY STRAPS вҖ” click or velcro each. TUG each to confirm secure.
9. Use lift mechanism per facility вҖ” lower chair into tub. Stay right next to resident.
10. Allow self-washing where able. Keep privacy towels. STAY IN ROOM.
11. Wash face first вҖ” eyes, face, neck.
12. Whirlpool 5 min if present and desired.
13. Shampoo hair if needed.
14. вӯҗ Washcloth MITT. Wash CLEANEST to DIRTIEST order:
    EYES (no soap, innerвҶ’outer, fresh section per eye) вҶ’ FACE/NECK/EARS вҶ’ ARMS/ARMPITS (shoulderвҶ’wrist) вҶ’ CHEST/ABDOMEN вҶ’ LEGS/FEET (between toes) вҶ’ BACK/BUTTOCKS вҶ’ PERINEAL CARE (change gloves)
15. Drain. Raise chair out of tub per facility procedure.
16. Drape towels/bath blanket вҖ” resident fully covered. Remove gloves.
17. Pat DRY every surface вҖ” folds, between toes, under breasts, armpits.
18. Apply deodorant, lotion, powder per preference. Back massage if in care plan.
19. Help into clean clothing. Return resident and supplies to room.
20. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.
21. Return to tub room. Gloves. Linens in hamper. Disinfect ALL tub and chair surfaces completely.

front:
SKILL 22 вҖ” SHOWER
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Towels, washcloths, soap, shampoo, clean clothing, gloves, shower chair if needed, bath thermometer
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Temperature 105В°F вҖ” resident tests spray before positioned under it
вӯҗ Monitor temperature THROUGHOUT shower
вӯҗ Clean CLEANEST TO DIRTIEST (same order as tub bath)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Prepare shower room FIRST вҖ” clean floor/walls, air temp, chair if needed.
4. Offer toilet. Assist if needed.
5. Walk/wheel resident and supplies. Help undress.
6. вӯҗ Turn ON water. Thermometer under stream вҖ” stabilize at 105В°F. Hold resident's hand near spray вҖ” THEY test before positioning under it. Monitor temp throughout.
7. Position resident. Cover genitalia with towel. Rinse body down completely. Gloves on.
8. Let resident self-wash where able. Soap/washcloth within reach. STAY in room.
9. Help wash face. Shampoo hair if needed.
10. вӯҗ Washcloth MITT. Wash CLEANEST to DIRTIEST:
    EYES (no soap, innerвҶ’outer, fresh section per eye) вҶ’ FACE/NECK/EARS вҶ’ ARMS/ARMPITS вҶ’ CHEST/ABDOMEN вҶ’ LEGS/FEET (between toes) вҶ’ BACK/BUTTOCKS вҶ’ PERINEAL CARE
11. Turn OFF water. Immediately wrap with towels. Remove gloves.
12. Pat ALL surfaces dry вҖ” folds, between toes, armpits, under breasts.
13. Back massage if indicated. Help dress. Remove gloves.
14. Return resident and supplies to room.
15. Call light. Wash hands. Report. Document.
16. Return to shower room. Gloves on. Linens in hamper. Disinfect shower and chair completely.

front:
SKILL 23 вҖ” PARTIAL BATH
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Washbasin, towels, washcloths, soap, clean clothing, gloves, bath thermometer
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Basin 2/3 full, вүӨ105В°F вҖ” resident tests with hand
вӯҗ Uncover ONLY body part being washed; towel UNDER it
вӯҗ Partial bath covers: FACE, ARMPITS, HANDS, and PERI CARE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Fill WASHBASIN 2/3 FULL. Thermometer вҖ” вүӨ105В°F. Carry to overbed table. Guide resident's fingers to water вҖ” THEY test. Adjust if needed.
4. Lock wheels. Adjust bed. Gloves on.
5. вӯҗ Fold back linens ONLY to uncover body part being washed. Place TOWEL UNDER that part as a mat.
6. Wash, rinse, dry one part at a time. Partial bath = FACE, ARMPITS, HANDS, PERI CARE.
7. вӯҗ EYES: no soap, fresh cloth section, innerвҶ’outer corner, one stroke per eye. Rinse, pat dry.
8. FACE: center outward strokes вҖ” forehead, cheeks, nose, mouth last. Ears and neck. Rinse. Pat dry.
9. ARMPITS and HANDS (far arm first). Rinse. Pat dry.
10. DUMP and REFILL basin after armpits вҖ” same temp check.
11. Reapply gloves. PERI CARE per procedure.
12. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
13. Help into clean gown. Grooming. Remove bath blanket, restore bedding.
14. Soiled items in proper containers.
15. Change gloves. Wash hands. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
16. Call light. Empty/rinse/dry basin. Return to storage. Discard gloves. Wash hands. Report. Document. Note skin changes.

front:
SKILL 24 вҖ” COMPLETE BED BATH
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Washbasin, bath blanket, towels, washcloths, soap, clean clothing, gloves, bath thermometer, lotion, orangewood stick
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Basin вүӨ105В°F вҖ” wrist test + resident tests; change water when cool/soapy/dirty
вӯҗ Bath blanket covers resident ENTIRELY вҖ” expose and re-cover ONE body part at a time
вӯҗ Order: HEAD DOWN, front first вҖ” Eyes/Face/Neck вҶ’ Arms/Hands вҶ’ Chest вҶ’ Abdomen вҶ’ Legs/Feet вҶ’ Back вҶ’ Perineal
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy. Warm room, no drafts.
3. вӯҗ Fill basin 2/3 FULL. Thermometer вҖ” вүӨ105В°F. Wrist test + RESIDENT tests. Change water when cool/soapy/dirty.
4. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Gloves on.
5. вӯҗ Drape BATH BLANKET over entire resident. Resident holds it. Pull top linens OUT from under вҖ” fan-fold to foot. Remove clothing under blanket. Bath blanket = only covering.
6. Uncover ONE body part at a time. Towel under each part. Re-cover before moving on.
7. Wash HEAD DOWN, front first. Use FRESH cloth section every stroke.

EYES/FACE/EARS/NECK: No soap for eyes; innerвҶ’outer per eye. Face: center outward. Rinse, dry.
ARMS/ARMPITS: Far arm first, shoulderвҶ’wrist, wash armpit. Rinse, dry, re-cover. Repeat near arm.
HANDS: Far hand вҖ” soap palm/back/each finger. Orangewood stick under nails. Rinse, dry (fully between fingers). Lotion on elbow + hand. Repeat near hand.
CHEST: Towel horizontally over chest. Blanket to waist. Wash under towel вҖ” including under breasts (check folds for irritation). Rinse, dry.
ABDOMEN: Towel over chest. Blanket just above pubic area. Wash abdomen. Rinse, dry. Cover, remove towel.
LEGS/FEET: Far leg only вҖ” blanket away. Towel lengthwise. ThighвҶ’kneeвҶ’ankleвҶ’foot. Between toes completely dry. Lotion on heels (NOT between toes). Re-cover. Near leg.
BACK: Roll resident toward far rail. Blanket away from back. Towel along spine. Long downward strokes neckвҶ’buttocks. Rinse, dry, lotion if ordered.
PERINEAL: Towel under buttocks. Roll to back. If resident CAN self-care вҖ” set up basin/cloth/towel, call light, privacy. If CANNOT вҖ” change gloves, fresh basin, perform peri care (Skills 25/26).

8. Change gloves and wash hands.
9. Deodorant. Fresh towel over pillow. Comb hair. Clean clothing. Comfortable alignment.
10. вӯҗ Remove bath blanket, replace with regular blanket in one smooth motion.
11. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
12. Call light. Empty/rinse/dry basin. Remove gloves. Wash hands. Report. Document skin issues.

front:
SKILL 25 вҖ” MALE PERINEAL CARE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, washbasin, washcloths, towels, bath blanket, bed protector, plastic bag
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ If uncircumcised: RETRACT foreskin to clean; REPLACE to normal position after вҖ” critical for circulation
вӯҗ Wash in SPIRAL CIRCLES from TIP toward BASE вҖ” new cloth section each circle
вӯҗ Front-to-back for perineum/anal area вҖ” one stroke per section, used cloth goes into bag (NEVER back in basin)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy. Warm room.
3. вӯҗ Fill basin 2/3 FULL. вүӨ105В°F. Wrist test + resident tests.
4. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Gloves on.
5. вӯҗ Bath blanket over resident. Pull regular linens out from under. Fold blanket UP from bottom вҖ” expose GENITALIA ONLY. Resident bends KNEES, feet flat on mattress.
6. Bed protector under hips/buttocks if needed.
7. вӯҗ Dip cloth, apply soap, form MITT. New section per EVERY stroke. Used sections into plastic bag вҖ” NEVER back in basin or on bed.
8. Check all surfaces вҖ” redness, open areas, rashes, swelling?
9. If uncircumcised: gently RETRACT foreskin toward base to expose glans.
10. Hold shaft gently steady.
11. вӯҗ Wash SPIRAL CIRCLES starting at TIP (meatus) working toward BASE вҖ” new cloth section per circle.
12. Rinse same way (tip to base). Pat DRY same direction.
13. вӯҗ If uncircumcised: gently REPLACE FORESKIN to normal position covering glans вҖ” CRITICAL, prevents circulation cutoff.
14. Fresh section вҖ” wash SCROTUM (all folds) and GROIN (inner thigh areas). Rinse. Pat dry.
15. Cover with bath blanket. Roll resident to side вҖ” back facing you.
16. If feces: toilet tissue to remove. Drop in bag. Change gloves + wash hands.
17. вӯҗ PERINEUM first, then ANAL area вҖ” FRONT TO BACK, one stroke per section.
18. RINSE front to back. Into bag. Pat dry.
19. Peri cream if ordered (change gloves first; nurse applies if for skin breakdown).
20. Apply incontinent brief if used. Remove bed protector.
21. Change gloves + wash hands. Comfortable position. Adjust clothing/linens.
22. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
23. Call light. Empty/rinse/dry basin. Remove gloves. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 26 вҖ” FEMALE PERINEAL CARE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, washbasin, washcloths, towels, bath blanket, bed protector, plastic bag
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Separate labia with non-dominant hand throughout entire washing process
вӯҗ ALWAYS FRONT-TO-BACK вҖ” NEVER reverse direction (prevents spreading bacteria to urethra)
вӯҗ One stroke per cloth section вҖ” used cloth directly into plastic bag, NEVER back in basin
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy. Warm room.
3. вӯҗ Fill basin 2/3 FULL. вүӨ105В°F. Wrist + resident test.
4. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Gloves on.
5. вӯҗ Bath blanket over resident. Pull regular linens out. Fold blanket UP from bottom вҖ” expose GENITALIA ONLY. Assist resident to BEND KNEES and SEPARATE LEGS.
6. Bed protector under hips if needed.
7. вӯҗ Dip cloth, apply soap, form MITT. New section per EVERY stroke. Into plastic bag вҖ” NEVER back in basin.
8. Check all surfaces вҖ” drainage, bleeding, redness, swelling, unusual odor?
9. вӯҗ Non-dominant hand GENTLY SEPARATES LABIA вҖ” hold apart throughout.
10. вӯҗ ONE SMOOTH DOWNWARD STROKE вҖ” from ABOVE URETHRA, OVER urethra, through perineum toward anus. Refold cloth each stroke.
11. Wash LABIA вҖ” downward strokes alternating left/right.
12. вӯҗ FRONT TO BACK only вҖ” each stroke fresh cloth section. NEVER vagina вҶҗ anus direction. Into bag.
13. RINSE same areas вҖ” clean wet cloth, same front-to-back direction.
14. Pat dry FRONT TO BACK.
15. If incontinent: wash MONS and lower abdomen.
16. Roll resident to side вҖ” back toward you. Only expose buttocks.
17. If feces: toilet tissue, change gloves, wash hands.
18. вӯҗ PERINEUM first then ANAL area вҖ” FRONT TO BACK. One stroke per section. Into bag.
19. Rinse. Pat dry.
20. Peri cream if ordered (change gloves; nurse if treating skin breakdown).
21. Brief if used. Remove bed protector.
22. Change gloves + wash hands. Comfortable position. Adjust clothing/linens.
23. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
24. Call light. Empty/rinse/dry basin. Remove gloves. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 27 вҖ” PROVIDING CATHETER CARE
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Gloves, washbasin, washcloths, towels, bed protector
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Hold catheter NEAR meatus вҖ” keep it still, do NOT pull or tug
вӯҗ Clean AT LEAST 4 INCHES of catheter starting AT meatus, stroking AWAY (one direction only)
вӯҗ RINSE then DRY same 4+ inches, same outward direction вҖ” never stroke back toward meatus
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. вӯҗ Fill basin with warm water. Wrist test вҖ” вүӨ105В°F. Resident check.
4. Lock wheels. Raise side rails. Adjust bed. Lower head flat.
5. Fold covers back. Drape BATH BLANKET.
6. Gloves on. Resident bends knees, pushes up hips вҖ” slide BED PROTECTOR under buttocks.
7. Fold bath blanket just enough to access catheter. Towel/pad UNDER catheter tubing (clean working surface).
8. Dip cloth, apply SOAP. Find MEATUS (opening where catheter enters body).
9. Wash skin AROUND meatus with small strokes, new section per stroke.
10. вӯҗ One hand HOLDS catheter near meatus вҖ” STEADY, firm but not bending. Do NOT pull or tug.
11. вӯҗ Other hand cleans AT LEAST 4 INCHES of catheter вҖ” starting AT meatus, stroke OUTWARD/AWAY in one direction only. New cloth section per stroke. NEVER stroke back toward meatus.
12. RINSE skin around meatus with clean cloth. Pat dry.
13. вӯҗ RINSE AT LEAST 4 INCHES of catheter вҖ” starting at meatus, moving away. New section per stroke.
14. вӯҗ DRY AT LEAST 4 INCHES of catheter вҖ” starting at meatus, moving away. No tugging.
15. Remove towel/pad. Change gloves + wash hands. Replace top sheet, remove bath blanket.
16. Bed to LOWEST. Side rails per order. Remove privacy.
17. Call light. Carry basin to bathroom вҖ” empty, clean, store.
18. Remove gloves. Wash hands. Report. Document.

front:
SKILL 28 вҖ” EMPTYING URINARY DRAINAGE BAG
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Graduate, alcohol wipes, paper towels, gloves
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Drain spout tip must NOT touch sides of graduate while emptying
вӯҗ After draining: wipe drain spout with ALCOHOL WIPE (all surfaces), then slide back into holder
вӯҗ Read graduate with EYES LEVEL to measurement line вҖ” note color, clarity, odor
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain briefly.
3. Privacy. Gloves on.
4. Lay PAPER TOWEL flat on floor beneath drainage bag. Set GRADUATE on it directly under drain spout.
5. вӯҗ Find drain spout at bottom of bag. Open CLAMP вҖ” urine flows DOWN into graduate. Tip of spout must NOT touch sides of graduate вҖ” hover above opening.
6. вӯҗ When bag is empty and flow stops: CLOSE CLAMP. Open ALCOHOL WIPE вҖ” wipe DRAIN SPOUT thoroughly (tip, sides, every surface). Slide spout back into its sleeve/holder on bag.
7. вӯҗ Carry graduate LEVEL to bathroom. Set on flat surface. CROUCH вҖ” eyes at MEASUREMENT LINE. Read at BOTTOM of liquid curve (meniscus). Note: COLOR, CLARITY, ODOR.
8. Empty graduate into toilet. Flush. Rinse graduate with clean water. Dry. Return to storage. Discard paper towels.
9. Remove gloves. Wash hands.
10. Write AMOUNT and CHARACTERISTICS (color, clarity, odor).

front:
SKILL 29 вҖ” MEASURING AND RECORDING URINARY/FLUID OUTPUT
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Graduate, gloves
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Crouch so eyes are LEVEL with measurement marks вҖ” read at bottom curve (meniscus)
вӯҗ Must be accurate within 25 mL
вӯҗ Wash hands BEFORE walking to documentation area
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Wash hands.
2. вӯҗ Gloves ON before touching bedpan or urinal.
3. Carry to bathroom. POUR contents carefully into graduate вҖ” tip gently, avoid splashing.
4. вӯҗ Set graduate on FLAT SURFACE. CROUCH вҖ” eyes LEVEL with measurement markings. Read at BOTTOM of liquid curve (meniscus). Write down amount. Convert to mL if in oz. Must be within 25 mL accuracy.
5. Empty graduate into toilet. No splashing.
6. RINSE graduate with clean water. Pour rinse into toilet.
7. RINSE bedpan or urinal. Pour rinse into toilet. FLUSH.
8. Place graduate and bedpan/urinal in proper cleaning area or wash and return.
9. Remove gloves.
10. вӯҗ Wash hands BEFORE walking to documentation area.
11. On I&O sheet вҖ” write TIME and AMOUNT in OUTPUT column.
12. Report changes to nurse.

front:
SKILL 30 вҖ” MEASURING & RECORDING BLOOD PRESSURE (ONE-STEP)
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
SUPPLIES: Sphygmomanometer, stethoscope, alcohol wipes
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
вӯҗ Arrow/center marker over BRACHIAL ARTERY, bottom edge 1вҖ“1ВҪ inches ABOVE inner elbow bend
вӯҗ First distinct TAPPING SOUND = SYSTOLIC (top number)
вӯҗ Sound DISAPPEARS = DIASTOLIC (bottom number); must be accurate within 4 BPM
в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җ
Q: Walk me through the full procedure.
back:
1. Knock. Wait. Enter. Identify self + resident.
2. Wash hands. Face-to-face. Explain. Privacy.
3. Wipe stethoscope EARPIECES and DIAPHRAGM with alcohol wipe.
4. Roll sleeve вҖ” entire upper arm bare, no clothing bunched under cuff.
5. Arm resting PALM UP at heart level.
6. Deflate cuff completely вҖ” open valve (counterclockwise), squeeze all air out.
7. вӯҗ Wrap cuff around UPPER ARM вҖ” center marker/arrow over BRACHIAL ARTERY (inner arm, thumb side). Bottom edge 1вҖ“1ВҪ INCHES ABOVE inner elbow bend. Snug but one finger fits under.
8. вӯҗ Find BRACHIAL PULSE: 2вҖ“3 fingertips on inner elbow crease (thumb side). Feel regular tapping.
9. Stethoscope earpieces IN (angled forward toward nose). DIAPHRAGM over brachial pulse.
10. Close valve (clockwise). Pump bulb to 160вҖ“180 mmHg (or up to 200 if you hear immediate beats when deflating).
11. Open valve very slightly вҖ” needle falls SLOWLY, 2вҖ“3 mmHg/sec.
12. вӯҗ Listen: first DISTINCT TAPPING SOUND out of silence = SYSTOLIC pressure. Memorize number.
13. Continue listening. Tapping softens then DISAPPEARS = DIASTOLIC pressure. Memorize number.
14. вӯҗ Open valve fully вҖ” needle to ZERO. Remove cuff.
15. Call light. Wipe stethoscope. Wash hands. Store equipment.
16. вӯҗ Record as FRACTION: SYSTOLIC/DIASTOLIC (e.g., 122/78). Note arm used (RA or LA). Within 4 BPM.
17. Report changes to nurse.
